mapper.select: SELECT MENU_NO , SOLD_OUT FROM MENU WHERE MENU_NO = #{menuNo}

SELECT ORDER_NO , QUANTITY , STATUS , REST_NAME , MENU_NAME FROM ORDERS O , MENU M , RESTAURANT R WHERE MEMBER_NO = #{memberNo} AND O.MENU_NO = M.MENU_NO AND M.REST_NO = R.REST_NO ORDER BY ORDER_NO DESC
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM TABLE ORDERS WHERE ORDER_NO = #{orderNo} AND STATUS = '주문접수'
